title: Dials and Wavers Change Everything
description: On Angel Island, the crew meets Conis and Pagaya and begins learning how life in the sky works.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, this scene centers on Conis, Nami, Pagaya, Luffy, Zoro. On Angel Island, the crew meets Conis and Pagaya and begins learning how life in the sky works.

dialogue.text: Good timing, I just finished fishing.
